name: Woovebox
use: Pocket 16-track groovebox with chord-follow system, step sequencer, Song mode fragments, sampler/vocoder, conditional triggering, and multi-FX
overview: Compact 16-track battery-powered groovebox. Hardware: Write/Play touch buttons, Value knob, 16 tactile microswitches with step LEDs, LED screen (8-char top row + 8-char bottom row), MIDI Type A, USB-C, Line In, Headphones/Sync Out, antenna. Tracks: 1/Cd (chord), 2/bS (bass), 3/Ld (lead), 4/Ar (arp), 5/Ki (kick), 6/Sn (snare), 7/hh (hi-hat), 8/Pc (perc), 9–13/A1–A5 (aux), 14/A6 (sampler), 15/A7 (live), 16/A8 (song). Structure: 16 songs → 16 tracks each → 16 patterns each → 16 steps each. Song mode: 99 fragments (Fr.01–Fr.99) each with per-track pattern/mute/automation + DJFX. Sampler: 2 banks × 16 kits (US.01–US.16) × 16 slices (12s max @ 22kHz 16-bit). Track parameter pages: Pttn → GLob → OSc1 → OSc2 → AMPL → FLtr → Pich → Pan → dyna. Song parameter pages: GLob → EFct → Fr.01–Fr.99. Chord-follow transposes all tracks to current chord. Auto-saves on every play press.
workflow: ═══ Getting Started ═══
Boot without touching Write or Play buttons (touch sensitivity calibrated on boot) → drops into Song mode
Set output volume: hold <kbd>Play</kbd> + turn Value knob. Select song: hold <kbd>Play</kbd> + press 1–16

Set BPM: enter Song mode (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press <kbd>16/A8/Song</kbd>) → GLob page (first page on left) → hold <kbd>1/Cd</kbd> + turn Value to set BPM (short-press <kbd>1/Cd</kbd> to read current value without changing it). BPM flows to delay times, LFO rates, and sample time-stretch — everything stays in sync automatically.

Set root note: in Song mode on GLob page → hold <kbd>2/bS</kbd> + turn Value (short-press to check current value). Default is C. Root affects chord voicings and which notes the scale considers 'legal'.

Set scale / mode: in Song mode on GLob page → hold <kbd>3/Ld</kbd> + turn Value. Default is major (C major = all white keys). Scale determines which notes are 'legal' across all chord-following tracks. For an out-of-scale note on the chord track, see FrE.C.
═══ Navigation & Modes ═══
Switch to a track: hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press 1–13 (tracks Cd–A5); hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + long-press 14–16 (tracks A6–A8). Note: short-press 14/15/16 opens Sampler/Live/Song instead

Select a patch: switch to track (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press 1–13) → turn Value knob to scroll to 'Pach' page → hold any category key (Cd–A2) + turn Value to browse — first item undoes last change, last item inits with saw wave
═══ Step Sequencing ═══

Program a step: switch to track → short-press <kbd>Value</kbd> to jump to SEq page → press 1–16 to audition note → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press step to record; hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press existing step to delete
Edit a step: on SEq page (short-press <kbd>Value</kbd> to get there) → hold step 1–16 until it blinks → press Value knob to cycle params (note / VELo / LEn / ShFt / when / do) → turn Value to change

Multi-step edit: on SEq page → hold first step until blinking → while holding, press <kbd>Write</kbd> and release step → still holding Write, select other steps → press Value to cycle params → turn Value to change all at once

Conditional trigger: on SEq page → hold step until blinking → press Value to cycle to 'when' param → turn Value (e.g. 1of4 = fires once every 4 loops). Cycle to 'do' for modification (with dot = silent if condition not met)
═══ Chord Track ═══

Set scale follow mode (FLW.C) per track: switch to track (hold Value + short-press 1–13 for Cd–A5; long-press 14–16 for A6–A8) → turn Value to GLob page → hold 4/FLW + turn Value → modes: off = no adaptation (sequenced notes play exactly as programmed, good for out-of-scale notes); root = always plays root of current chord (ideal for bass); CLS.A = snaps to nearest chord tone (ideal for arps); LGL = restricts to in-key/in-scale notes only (scale follow for live jamming); trS = dynamically transposes to fit the chord (chord-aware improvisation). Live-played notes always conform to scale regardless of FLW.C.

Add an out-of-scale note (melodic tracks): set track FLW.C to off (GLob page → hold 4/FLW + turn Value → off). Then on SEq page: hold step until blinking → press Value to cycle to 'note' param → turn Value — full MIDI pitch range is accessible including chromatic/out-of-scale pitches. With FLW.C = off, sequenced notes are never snapped to scale.

Add an out-of-scale chord (chord track via FrE.C): enter Song mode (hold Value + short-press 16/A8/Song) → GLob page → hold 4/Ar + turn Value to set FrE.C = yes (firmware 2421+). Now chord steps with out-of-scale root notes (e.g. C# in C major) will play back as programmed instead of being snapped to the nearest legal scale note.

Play & program chords (track 1/Cd): switch to track 1 (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press <kbd>1/Cd</kbd>) → keys 1–3 and 5–8 play 7 chords from type 1 (lower bank); keys 9–11 and 13–16 play 7 chords from type 2 (upper bank). Change chord type: hold <kbd>4/CdLo</kbd> (lower bank) or <kbd>12/CdHi</kbd> (upper bank) + turn Value — both banks can have different chord types. To program: short-press <kbd>Value</kbd> for SEq page → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + press step to record current chord
═══ Song Mode ═══

Play one pattern then stop (for external recording): enter Song mode (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press <kbd>16/A8/Song</kbd>) → turn Value right to Fr.01 → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press tracks to enable → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + turn Value to set length (match your pattern length) → turn Value right to Fr.02 → leave length at 0 and enable no tracks → screen shows 'End' → playback stops automatically after Fr.01 finishes ★

Song mode arrangement: enter Song mode (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press <kbd>16/A8/Song</kbd>) → turn Value right past GLob/EFct until screen reads Fr.01 → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press tracks to enable per fragment → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + turn Value to set fragment length

Edit fragment track settings: in Song mode (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press <kbd>16/A8</kbd>) on a Fr.xx page → hold a lit (enabled) track button until blinking → press Value to cycle: Pttn# / Behv / CdLk / retr.Pt → turn Value to change
Fragment DJ FX mode: while on Fr.01–Fr.99, hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + press <kbd>16/A8/Song</kbd> — access filter sweep, gater, drone, buffer FX

Create song fragments: Enter Song mode (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press <kbd>16/A8/Song</kbd>) → turn Value right past GLob/EFct until screen reads Fr.01 → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + turn Value to set fragment length (bar count) → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press tracks 1–16 to enable them in this fragment → to configure per-track: hold any lit track until blinking → press Value to cycle Pttn# / Behv / CdLk / retr.Pt → turn Value to change. Behv options: play / mute / fade in-out / filter+pitch+gater effects. Context menu (hold Write + short-press Value): insert / clone / delete fragments
═══ Live Mode ═══

Live mode scenes: scenes are Live mode's equivalent of Song mode fragments — each scene (1–16) stores which tracks are muted/unmuted plus per-track pattern#, behavior, chord lock, and retrigger settings. The 'Live scene' is your current improvised state; 'programmed scenes 1–16' are saved snapshots. Switch immediately: hold <kbd>Play</kbd> + short-press 1–16. Schedule (waits for current scene to end): hold <kbd>Play</kbd> + long-press 1–16. Edit a scene's per-track settings: hold lit track until blinking → press Value to cycle Pttn# / Behv / CdLk / retr.Pt → turn Value. Use scenes for live transitions and arrangement without a fixed song structure.

Live mode: enter Live mode (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press <kbd>15/A7</kbd>) → mute/unmute tracks: hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + press 1–16 → select improvisation track: hold <kbd>Play</kbd> 2s until 'Slct trak', then press track button
═══ Sampling ═══

Record sample: enter Sampler (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press <kbd>14/A6</kbd>) → select kit (hold <kbd>Play</kbd> + short-press 1–16) → turn Value to choose input format → press Play to monitor VU → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + hold slot 1–16 to record. Apply kit to track: context menu (hold Write + short-press Value) → 'SMPK Pach' → switch to track (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press/long-press track button) → 'Pste Pach'

Sample a drum kit: enter Sampler (hold Value + short-press 14/A6) → select kit (hold Play + press 1–16) → select format (turn Value: 44.8 line for drums) → press Play to monitor VU levels → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + hold a slot 1–16 to record each hit. Edit slice: hold slice until blinking → press Value to cycle St.C/St.F/En.C/En.F/Mode/Warp/Pich. Auto-slice a loop: open context menu (hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press <kbd>Value</kbd>) → select Auto or Even → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + turn Value to set count 2–16 → long-press <kbd>Value</kbd> to execute. Exit sampler to commit. Apply to track: context menu → SMPK Pach → switch to track (hold Value + short-press/long-press track button) → Pste Pach. Resample own audio: exit sampler, play song, re-enter sampler, context menu → SKiP bacK
═══ Live Recording ═══

Live record overdub: switch to track (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press 1–13) → press <kbd>Play</kbd> to start playback → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press <kbd>Play</kbd> to enter overdub (count-in then records) → short-press <kbd>Play</kbd> to stop recording. Erase: hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + long-press <kbd>Play</kbd>

Live record quantized notes: switch to track (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press 1–13 for Cd–A5; long-press 14–16 for A6–A8) → press Play to start → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press <kbd>Play</kbd> for overdub (count-in starts on release). Press keys to record — notes snap to nearest step. To toggle auto-quantize during recording: hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + long-press <kbd>Play</kbd>. Punch in/out: hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press <kbd>Play</kbd> twice (erases steps as playhead passes, only after first note). Stop recording: short-press <kbd>Play</kbd>. Post-clean-up: short-press <kbd>Value</kbd> to go to SEq page → open context menu (hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press <kbd>Value</kbd>) → select qant pttn → long-press <kbd>Value</kbd> to execute (destructive snap to grid)
═══ Pattern & Creative Effects ═══

Chain patterns: switch to track (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press track 1–13 / long-press 14–16) → turn Value right to Pttn page → hold <kbd>3/Ch.ne</kbd> + turn Value to set next pattern (SELF = loop back) → hold <kbd>4/Ch.rP</kbd> + turn Value to set repeat count before switching. Quick auto-chain: context menu (hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press <kbd>Value</kbd>) → Chn → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + turn Value to set N patterns to chain

Solo a track: first switch to the track you want to solo (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press for Cd–A5; hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + long-press for A6–A8) → once on that track, hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press the SAME button again → screen shows 'SoLo On'. Repeat gesture to cancel ('SoLo Off'). For A6–A8: hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + long-press the same button again

Undo: enter Song mode (hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + short-press <kbd>16/A8/Song</kbd>) → turn Value left to GLob page → open context menu (hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + short-press <kbd>Value</kbd>) → find 'Undo' → hold <kbd>Write</kbd> + long-press <kbd>Value</kbd> to execute

Ear candy & risers: (1) Chord-quantized pitch LFO bells: switch to track → turn Value to Pich page → hold <kbd>1/L1.Md</kbd> + turn Value to Chrd → set L1.Wv + L1.dp + L1.rt. (2) Riser preset: select riser/faller patch on an aux track (Pach page), enable that track in a fragment. (3) DJ FX riser: Song mode → Fr.xx page → hold <kbd>Value</kbd> + press <kbd>16/A8</kbd> for DJ FX → set nois + FL.St/FL.En. (4) Shimmer delay: Song mode → turn Value to EFct page → hold <kbd>4/d2.Al</kbd> + turn Value to spkl; then on each track GLob page set dly2 send. (5) Retrigger fills: Song mode → Fr.xx → hold lit track until blinking → press Value to cycle to retr.Pt → turn Value. (6) Conditional fills: SEq page (short-press <kbd>Value</kbd>) → hold step until blinking → press Value to cycle to 'when' → set 1of4 or 1of8

shortcuts.action: Track Mode: switch to track Cd–A5 for editing ★
Track Mode: switch to tracks A6 / A7 / A8 (must long-press — short-press opens Sampler / Live / Song instead) ★
Sampler Mode: short-press once = Sampler, twice = Vocoder ★
Live Mode: enter Live mode ★
Song Mode: enter Song mode ★
Scroll through pages — works in all modes (Track: Seq→Pttn→GLob→Osc1→Osc2→AMPL→FLtr→Pich→dyna→Pach; Song: GLob→EFct→Fr.01–Fr.99; Sampler: select input source; Live: scenes) ★
Jump to Seq page / toggle back to previous page
Open context menu (cycle through options) ★
Select sub-item or set parameter
Action / execute the selected menu item ★
Set duration of note / live scene / song fragment ★
Show long parameter name on screen
Change that parameter's value ★
Fast value change
Snap to nearest min / max / half value
Set output volume ★
Select song 1–16 ★
Show battery level ★
Start / stop song or pattern ★
Change playing octave up/down ★
Audition note or slice
Program note / slice on step ★
Delete note / slice on step ★
Edit step params: note / VELo / LEn / ShFt / when / do ★

shortcuts.combo: Hold step + press [Write] + release step → select more steps
shortcuts.action: Multi-step edit: change params for all selected steps at once ★
Select pattern 1–16 ★
Live recording — overdub mode (keeps existing steps) ★
Live recording — punch in/out mode (erases steps as playhead passes, starts on first note played)
Toggle auto-quantize on/off during live recording ★
Stop live recording (keeps playback going)
Live recording erase

shortcuts.combo: Short-press [Value] (→ SEq) → hold [Write] + short-press [Value] (context menu) → qant pttn → long-press [Value]
shortcuts.action: Destructive quantize: snap all steps to grid ★

shortcuts.combo: Switch to track → turn [Value] to GLob page → hold [9/A1] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Non-destructive groove/swing (positive=swing, negative=progressive quantize)
Solo current track / repeat to unsolo ★
Solo A6–A8 track / repeat to unsolo
Play 7 chords from chord type 1 (lower bank) ★
Play 7 chords from chord type 2 (upper bank)
Cycle chord type for lower bank (keys 1–3, 5–8) — e.g. diat tri / diat 7th / dom / etc. ★
Cycle chord type for upper bank (keys 9–11, 13–16) — Lo and Hi banks can use different chord types ★
Set master volume (M.VoL 0–127)
Transpose track in semitones (trSP) ★
Synthesis algorithm (ALgo): how OSc1+OSc2 combine
Chord-follow mode (FLW): off / root / CLS.A / LGL / trS ★
Groove/swing (grvE): positive = swing, negative = quantize
Bit crush (bt.Cr): crush LSBs for lo-fi sound
Saturation (SatU): warm/analog distortion
Distortion (dist): two types + amount
Reverb send (rEvb)
Chorus send (chor)
Primary delay send (dely)
Secondary delay send (dly2)
Spectral quality: auto / FuLL / 50 / 25 — reduce DSP load or add lo-fi effect
Bass transpose (chord track only): adds sub-bass note 1 or 2 octaves below triad chords
Track behavior: Bass/Lead/Arpg/Kick/Snre/HiHt/Perc/SmpL/SmpK/Slnt/MuIn — affects rand Pttn, UI, stem export ★
MIDI channel: which channel this track sends note/CC messages on
BPM divisor: divides song BPM for this pattern's speed
Pattern length in steps ★
Chain next: which pattern plays after this one (SELF=loop) ★
Chain repeat: how many times pattern repeats before switching

shortcuts.combo: Pttn page → context menu → Chn → hold [Write] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Auto-chain N patterns in sequence ★
Mute length: how long pattern mutes
Unmute length: how long pattern un-mutes after mute period
Mute/unmute offset (16th notes): shifts when mute cycle begins — negative value = pattern starts unmuted ★
Playthrough counter reset: AUdb (only when pattern changes) / Awys (always reset, needed with Ch.rP repeats)
Override global chord-follow behavior for this pattern: GLob / off / LGL / root / CLS.A / CLS.3 / trS.1–3 / roo.5 etc.
MIDI patch change number sent when pattern starts (1-based, 0=off, firmware 2817+)
MIDI patch bank MSB sent with patch change (firmware 2817+)
MIDI patch bank LSB sent with patch change (firmware 2817+)
Shows one step duration in ms for this pattern (useful for tempo-syncing external gear / envelope times)
Mute / unmute tracks in Live scene ★
Switch between Live scene or programming scene 1–16
Use Live scene mutes/solos in Sequencer/Track Edit mode
Select track to improvise / play melodies on ★
Switch to scene 1–16 immediately
Schedule scene change (switches when current scene ends)

shortcuts.combo: Hold lit track [1–16] until blinking → press [Value]
shortcuts.action: Edit track behavior, pattern#, chord lock, retrigger for scene ★

shortcuts.combo: Hold first track + hold [Write] + release + select others
shortcuts.action: Edit multiple tracks at once for scene

shortcuts.combo: Turn [Value] to first 'End' fragment + hold [Write] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Add new fragment / set fragment length ★
Enable / disable track for current fragment ★

shortcuts.combo: Hold lit track in fragment until blinking
shortcuts.action: Edit: Pttn# / Behv / CdLk / retr.Pt per track ★

shortcuts.combo: Hold first track + hold [Write] + release + select others
shortcuts.action: Edit multiple tracks at once for fragment
Manage fragments ★
Enter / exit Fragment DJ FX mode ★
Mix Start: -127 = buffer only · 0 = 50:50 · +127 = synth only (crossfade start point)
Mix End: same scale as Mi.St — automates crossfade over fragment duration ★
Noise Volume Start: white noise level at fragment start — ramp to n.V.En for risers
Noise Volume End: white noise level at fragment end
Gater: positive = Aud target (gates DJ FX audio, synth unaffected) · negative = FLt target (gates filtered audio per Fl.tG setting)
Filter Target: MiX (entire mix) · buFF (buffer only) · Synt (synth only) · noiS (noise only)
Filter Start: -127 = LP closed · 0 = off · +127 = HP. Set low start + high end for riser ★
Filter End: same scale as FL.St — sweeps resonant filter over fragment ★
Drone Volume Start: sine wave tone volume at start. Negative = stereo width (inaudible mono)
Drone Volume End
Drone Pitch Start: MIDI semitones. Notes below #19 (~25Hz) are HP-filtered toward silence
Drone Pitch End — sweeps drone pitch over fragment (faller = high start, low end) ★
Buffer Length in quarter notes — applies to BOTH record and playback in this fragment ★
Buffer Play Mode: FWd1/FWd2 (fwd) · rvS1/rvS2 (rev) · pin1/pin2 (fwd→rev) · pon1/pon2 (rev→fwd) · PrEP (silent pre-record) ★
Buffer Record Source: Sy-1/Sy-2 (synth) · Mi-1/Mi-2 (full mix) · Li-1/Li-2 (line in) · oSy/oMi/oLi = overdub variants ★

shortcuts.combo: Mi.St = Mi.En = -127 + b.PLy = PrEP + b.LEn + b.rEc set
shortcuts.action: Silent pre-record (PrEP): records without audio output, purges reverb/delay/decay tails → clean start on next fragment. Display shows 'P' ★

shortcuts.combo: Hold [Value] + short-press [14/A6] (repeat if needed until screen = SMPL)
shortcuts.action: Enter Sampler mode (repeat to toggle Sampler ↔ Vocoder) ★
Select kit US.01–US.16 ★
Toggle audio input monitoring + VU metering on/off
Select input source: 22.16 line (synths/piano) / 44.8 line (drums/voice, lo-fi) / Mic 24db (voice/mic) ★
Record sample to slot 1–16 (hold for duration of recording) ★
Skip-back resample: captures last 11.8s of audio that played before entering sampler ★
Clone last-pressed slice into next free slot
Delete last-pressed slice

shortcuts.combo: Context menu → Auto → hold [Write] + turn [Value] for count (2–16)
shortcuts.action: Auto-slice by transients (up to 16 slices) ★

shortcuts.combo: Context menu → Even → hold [Write] + turn [Value] for count (2–16)
shortcuts.action: Even-slice at beat divisions (use for chopping drum loops / Amen break)
Same as Auto/Even but slice end points extend to master sample end (keeps audio flowing)
Collapse all slices back to one master-sample slice (recovers 'lost' audio)

shortcuts.combo: Hold slice [1–16] until blinking → press [Value] → turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Edit slice params: St.C (start coarse) / St.F (start fine) / En.C / En.F / Mode / Warp / Pich ★

shortcuts.combo: Hold first slice until blinking → hold [Write] → release slice → select others → press [Value]
shortcuts.action: Multi-slice edit: change params for multiple slices at once
Audition slice

shortcuts.combo: Context menu → 'SMPK Pach' → switch to track → 'Pste Pach'
shortcuts.action: Apply sampler kit to track Cd–A8 ★
Commits all sampler changes — undo via context menu before exiting to revert

shortcuts.combo: Turn [Value] to Pach page, hold category key + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Browse patches; first = undo, last = init with saw wave ★
BLE enable — display reads 'boot bLE' ★
BLE enable in compatibility mode — works around Android/iOS BLE bugs, display reads 'boot bLE'
Recovery mode — boots with BLE compat mode but NO data loaded and sound engine disabled (use if boot-loop)
⚠ Delete all samples — all sample data lost
⚠ Factory reset — all songs, samples, and patches lost
Boosted brightness + LED test + firmware version — turn Value to change brightness, press Value to continue boot ★
Increase capacitive button sensitivity — useful for dry/callused fingers
Switch physical MIDI port to MIDI IN instead of MIDI OUT (15BSE / 15BPRO / 15B2 hardware only)
Enable remote control expander mode — lets any MIDI device control the Woovebox
Play stop protection (firmware 2435+) — Play button no longer stops playback; stop via Song mode instead ★
Demo mode — starts with empty song, autosave + song restore disabled ★
Disable autosave only — song restore still works; manual save available in Song GLob context menu (firmware 2421+)

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [1/Cd] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: BPM (tempo) — short-press [1/Cd] to read current value ★

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [2/bS] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Root note — sets tonal center for scale/chord system ★

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [3/Ld] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Scale / mode — determines which notes are 'legal' across chord-following tracks ★

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [4/Ar] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: FrE.C (Free Chord): yes = allow out-of-scale chord root notes on playback; no (default) = snap to nearest legal scale note (firmware 2421+) ★

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [5/Ki] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: noi.F Noise floor (0–127): base vinyl/tape hiss level always audible beneath mix

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [6/Sn] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: noi.c Noise character: lower=periodic vintage hiss (vinyl), higher=white noise

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [7/hh] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: SEEd Random seed: off=true random each playback; 1–32767=fixed seed so conditional triggers repeat identically ★

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [8/Pc] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: LG.Pi Legacy pitch behavior: v2.0 (default) or v1.0 compat mode for old songs

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [9/A1] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: MC.th Master compressor threshold

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [10/A2] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: MC.rt Master compressor ratio

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [11/A3] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: MC.at Master compressor attack

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [12/A4] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: MC.rL Master compressor release

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [13/A5] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Sync: analog sync pulse output mode for clocking external gear

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob page → hold [14/A6] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Sm.Bk Sample bank: selects which sample bank (1 or 2) this song uses

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob / EFct page → context menu
shortcuts.action: duMP SonG (SYSEX+WAV export) / duMP StMd / duMP StMW (stems dry/wet) / Init rand / Init bSic / Init MIDI / dSP InFo / Mirr dvcE / norM MVoL / undo ★

shortcuts.combo: SEq page → context menu → sLct saME → long-press [Value]
shortcuts.action: Select all steps with same note as currently held step — bulk edit pitch/velocity/length ★

shortcuts.combo: SEq page → context menu → rand pt.ch → long-press [Value]
shortcuts.action: Randomize entire pattern chain at once (only available when current pattern belongs to a chain) ★

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → GLob → context menu → find Undo → hold [Write] + hold [Value]
shortcuts.action: Undo (restore before last save)

shortcuts.combo: Global page context menu → Init rand → long-press [Value]
shortcuts.action: Clear song + init tracks with random presets ★

shortcuts.combo: SEq page context menu → rand Pttn
shortcuts.action: Generate random pattern for current track ★

shortcuts.combo: Pach page context menu → rand Pach
shortcuts.action: Generate random patch for current track
Waveform: NOIS/Sin1/Tri1/Saw1/Sqr1/SSw1–4 (7-saw detuned)/US01–16/In12/Dly1/Dly2 ★
Oscillator output level
Coarse pitch detune (octaves)
Fine pitch detune (semitones)
AEG depth: 0=off, 127=full, negative=exponential response ★
Play mode: Loop/LooR/OneS/OneR/FxLn (fixed length)/FwRv (ping-pong)
Style: Mdrn/dGtL/dGt.v/AnL1–4 (analog pitch drift emulation)
Sample-and-hold: reduce sample rate (0=44.1kHz, 2=14.7kHz for lo-fi hip-hop)
Amplitude LFO trigger: FrEE (free-running) / Retr (restart on note) / Cond (conditional) / rand (random phase)
Pitch LFO retrigger: FrEE / Retr / Cond / rand
Amplitude key tracking: higher notes = louder (or quieter if negative)
Phase mode: nrML (fixed start) / notE (start position depends on note pitch — transient shaping, FM variety)
Phase start: waveform start position % (0=beginning, 100=end) — set both Ph.St=0 + Ph.rn=100 for free-running analog feel
Phase range: how far from Ph.St the random start can go
Key follow: 100=normal pitch tracking, 0=fixed pitch oscillator (FM/AM carrier), 200=double pitch tracking ★
Slice select: 1–16 (per step SLcE), MSM1/MSM2 (multi-sample auto-select by pitch), Sl1–Sl16 (fixed slice) ★
Osc1 AEG Attack (ms) ★
Osc1 AEG Decay (ms)
Osc1 AEG Sustain (0–127)
Osc1 AEG Release (ms) ★
Osc1 amp LFO waveform (nOiSE/SinE/tri/SaW/Sqr)
Osc1 amp LFO depth (negative = waveform inverted)
Osc1 amp LFO rate (steps, BPM-synced)
Osc2 ADSR — mirrors Osc1 layout ★
Osc1 amp LFO hold (ms): LFO pauses at sampled value — combines with rate for rhythmic tremolo patterns
Osc2 ADSR — mirrors Osc1 layout ★
Osc2 amp LFO waveform / depth / rate
Osc2 amp LFO hold (ms)
Copy AEG settings between oscillators
Filter type: none/LoW1/LoW2 (24dB LP)/bnd1–4 (BP)/hiP1–4 (HP)/not1–2 (notch) ★
Filter cutoff frequency ★
Filter resonance (high rESo → self-oscillation/scream on some filter types)
Filter key tracking: positive = higher notes open filter more; negative = inverse
Filter envelope depth (0=off, 127=full, negative=exponential) ★
Filter LFO retrigger: FrEE / Retr (restart on note) / Cond (conditional) / rand (random phase)
Cutoff → AEG decay link: open filter = longer release (trance staccato/buildup trick)
Cutoff → reverb+delay send link: open filter = wider sound (intimate→wide effect)
Filter EG Attack (ms)
Filter EG Decay (ms)
Filter EG Sustain (0–127)
Filter EG Release (ms) ★
Filter LFO waveform (nOiSE/SinE/tri/SaW/Sqr)
Filter LFO depth (negative = inverted)
Filter LFO rate (BPM-synced steps) ★
Filter LFO hold (ms): pause at sampled cutoff value for rhythmic wah/step-filter effects
Pitch LFO 1 mode: nrML/Chrd (chord-quantized)/Scal (scale-quantized)/SEmi (semitone) ★
Pitch LFO 2 mode: same options; use Chrd for chord-quantized melodic shimmer ★
Osc3 sub/super level: positive=follows Osc1, negative=follows Osc2 ★
Osc3 octave offset (negative=sub-bass, positive=harmonic overtone)
Portamento speed (Off=disabled; both Prt.S and Prt.P must be non-zero to enable)
Portamento probability %: 100=always glide, partial = occasional glide ★
Legato speed (Off=disabled; iMMd=instant; both LEG.S and LEG.P must be non-zero)
Legato probability %: 100=always legato when notes overlap ★
Pitch LFO 1 waveform (Noise/Sine/Tri/Saw/Sqr)
Pitch LFO 1 depth in octaves (±4.0); negative inverts phase
Pitch LFO 1 rate in steps (BPM-synced) ★
Pitch LFO 1 hold (ms)
Pitch LFO 2 waveform (Noise/Sine/Tri/Saw/Sqr)
Pitch LFO 2 depth in octaves (±4.0)
Pitch LFO 2 rate in steps (BPM-synced)
Pitch LFO 2 hold (ms)
Static pan position in stereo field ★
Pitch-to-pan: higher notes pan further left or right — useful for stereo spread on polyphonic patches
Auto-pan LFO waveform (Noise/Sine/Tri/Saw/Sqr)
Auto-pan LFO depth (negative = inverted)
Auto-pan LFO rate (BPM-synced) ★
Auto-pan LFO hold (ms)
Start-position LFO waveform — modulates where waveform playback begins each note
Start-position LFO depth
Start-position LFO rate (BPM-synced)
Start-position LFO hold (ms)

shortcuts.combo: Switch to track → turn [Value] to Pich page → hold [1/L1.Md] (or [2/L2.Md]) + turn [Value] = Chrd → set waveform + depth + rate
shortcuts.action: Chord-quantized pitch LFO → shimmering bell/arp ear candy that follows chord ★

shortcuts.combo: Switch to track → turn [Value] to Pich page → hold [1/L1.Md] + turn [Value] = Scal
shortcuts.action: Scale-quantized pitch LFO → melodic runs stay in key

shortcuts.combo: Switch to track → turn [Value] to OSc1 page → hold [6/A.L.tr] + turn [Value] = Cond
shortcuts.action: Conditional tremolo: amplitude LFO fires only on steps marked with ALFO condition ★

shortcuts.combo: Switch to track → turn [Value] to OSc1 page → hold [7/P.L.tr] + turn [Value] = Cond
shortcuts.action: Conditional vibrato: pitch LFO fires only on steps marked with PLFO condition
Periodic fill: step fires once every 4 (or 8) loops ★
Micro-timing shift for ghost notes, flamming, humanization (50 = halfway to next step)

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → turn [Value] to EFct page → hold [4/d2.Al] + turn [Value] = spkl; then per track: GLob page → hold [16/dly2] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Shimmer/sparkle delay: pitch-shifted repeat adds harmonics ★

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → turn [Value] to EFct page → hold [8/Vn.Cr] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Vinyl crackle (negative = only during playback)

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → Fr.xx page → hold [Value] + press [16/A8] (DJ FX mode) → set nois + FL.St/FL.En
shortcuts.action: Riser: open filter over noise for classic buildup ★

shortcuts.combo: Song mode → Fr.xx page → hold [Value] + press [16/A8] (DJ FX mode) → set d.V.St/d.P.St pitch falling
shortcuts.action: Faller: pitched sine drone descending to release tension

shortcuts.combo: Fragment → hold lit track → cycle to retr.Pt + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Retrigger pattern: stutter/fill applied to track within a fragment ★

shortcuts.combo: Riser/faller preset: Pach page → load riser/faller from presets onto an aux track
shortcuts.action: Use built-in riser/faller patches — enable in a fragment for instant transitions
Open filter → auto-lengthens AEG release: staccato-to-lush buildup trick ★
Open filter → boosts reverb+delay sends: intimate-to-wide sweep ★

shortcuts.combo: Switch to track → GLob page → hold [10/bt.Cr] + turn [Value]; then OSc1 page → hold [16/SM.Ho] + turn [Value]
shortcuts.action: Bit crush + sample rate reduce: lo-fi tape/vinyl texture on any track

tips: Track parameter page order: Pttn → GLob → OSc1 → OSc2 → AMPL → FLtr → Pich → Pan → dyna. Short-press Value to jump to SEq; turn Value knob to scroll pages.
Chord-follow (FLW.C) modes: 'root' on bass = always plays root of chord; 'CLS.A' on arp = nearest chord tone; 'LGL' on lead = in-key only; 'trS' = dynamic transpose for chord-aware improvisation ★
Prime pattern lengths (3, 5, 7, 11) on the arp create ever-changing polyrhythmic runs; even lengths (4, 8, 16) sound conventional. Mix per-track lengths for automatic variation.
Conditional 'when' + 'do': 'when'=1of4 fires every 4th loop. 'do' with dot (e.g. SldE.) = silent when condition not met; without dot = plays normally but modified
Song mode fragments: 99 fragments (Fr.01–Fr.99) per song. Each fragment can select different pattern# per track, mute/play, apply automation, and use DJ FX transitions.

Fragment DJ FX page (15 params): 1/Mi.St + 2/Mi.En (mix crossfade -127=buf only/+127=synth only), 3/n.V.St + 4/n.V.En (noise vol ramp), 5/Gatr (gater: +Aud or -FLt target), 6/Fl.tG (filter target: MiX/buFF/Synt/noiS), 7/FL.St + 8/FL.En (filter sweep -127=LP/0=off/+127=HP), 9-10/d.V.St+En (drone vol; neg=stereo width), 11-12/d.P.St+En (drone pitch MIDI semitones), 13/b.LEn (buffer length, shared rec+play), 14/b.PLy (FWd/rvS/pin/pon/PrEP × buf 1/2), 15/b.rEc (Sy/Mi/Li × 1/2 + oSy/oMi/oLi overdub) ★
ADSR envelope per oscillator: AtK (attack ms), dcy (decay ms), SuS (sustain 0–127), rLS (release ms). Each oscillator has independent ADSR + two amplitude LFOs.
Filter page (FLtr): type = LP/BP/HP; Cut.F = cutoff; rESo = resonance; FEG.d = filter envelope depth; ADSR shapes filter sweep. C2dc links filter cutoff to AEG decay for tension buildups.

Dynamics page (dyna): per-track sidechain (Sd.dP depth, Sd.Gt gate, Sd.At attack, Sd.rL release) + compressor (CM.Th threshold, CM.rt ratio, CM.At attack, CM.rL release) + noiS noise generator for analog feel
Song global effects: dual delay units (dLLn length, dLFb feedback, dLwd stereo width), chorus (chSP speed, cht1/cht2 times, ch.AL algorithm), reverb (rvFb feedback, rvtM time), vinyl crackle (Vn.Cr)
Panning page (Pan): static pan + P.2.Pn pitch-to-stereo spread + auto-pan LFO (Au.Wv/Au.dE/Au.rt/Au.Ho) + start position LFO (St.Wv/St.dE/St.rt/St.Ho)
Pitch page (Pich): Prt.S portamento speed, LEG.S legato speed, O3.Lv/O3.Oc for Osc3 sub voice, two independent pitch LFOs each with waveform/depth/rate/hold
Sampler structure: 2 banks × 16 kits × 16 slices. Each slice: 12s max @ 22.05kHz 16-bit or 44.1kHz 8-bit μ-law, with start/end point, play mode, warp mode, pitch tuning.
BPM is global — changing it auto-adjusts delay times, LFO rates, and sample time-stretch. No tempo drift across tracks.
Auto-save on every play press — no manual save needed. Battery % shown during save. Hold Play + short-press Value to check battery level anytime.
GLob page bEhv (Track Behavior) defines per-track playback, UI, functionality, stem rendering, and file management behavior.
b.div BPM divisor on chord track defaults to 4 — chord track plays at 1/4 speed, giving one chord per bar at standard 4/4 patterns
